description: Create a new promotion campaign named 'Influencer Summer Campaign' for the 'Urban Electronics' store in Drupal Commerce. The promotion must offer 20% off the order subtotal, require a minimum order amount of $200.00, and be set to require a coupon. Create and link exactly five active coupons to this promotion with the following codes and usage limits: 'INFL-EMMA' (100), 'INFL-ALEX' (75), 'INFL-SARA' (50), 'INFL-MIKE' (150), and 'INFL-LILY' (200). Ensure both the promotion and all coupons are enabled and active.
